summary: Focana 2.3.0 adds a trustworthy focus rhythm with Pomodoro, gentle long-session break checks, and mid-session timer extension.
improvements: Pomodoro is now a first-class start option with 25/5, 50/10, and custom work/break lengths.
Pomodoro breaks stay skippable with Keep going, preserving the same focus run without an interim wrap-up.
Long timed and Freeflow sessions can now offer a gentle 90-minute break check that respects quiet-time rules and stays out of Pomodoro mode.
Timed sessions now support adding more time mid-session from full, compact, and floating timer controls.
Focus nudges now share calmer suppression behavior around Do Not Disturb, active typing, paused sessions, and snoozed re-entry.
fixes: Floating re-entry snooze now stays quiet without pulsing the minimized logo during the snooze window.
Pomodoro work intervals now transition into internal break state instead of the normal Time Up flow.
